name: RebarPropertiesNullable
summary: The RebarPropertiesNullable class defines the properties of the reinforcing bars affected by a RebarPropertyModifier.

constructors.name: RebarPropertiesNullable
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the RebarPropertiesNullable class.

properties.name: BendingRadius
properties.summary: Gets or sets the bending radius radius of the reinforcement.

properties.name: Class
properties.summary: Gets or sets the class of the reinforcement. The class is used to group reinforcements.

properties.name: Grade
properties.summary: Gets or sets the steel grade of the reinforcing bar. The grade indicates the strength of the steel used in reinforcing bars. It can also indicate other factors, such as the weldability or surface deformations of the bar.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the reinforcement.

properties.name: NumberingSeries
properties.summary: Gets or sets the numbering series of the reinforcement.

properties.name: Size
properties.summary: Gets or sets the size of the reinforcement.
